useDashboardUser composable supplies current_user display fields via context without re-implementing header/sidebar chrome

dashboard-main boundary on DashboardMain root; SHELL-06 wrapper div removed in favor of component-owned marker
Greeting-row slot region; widget internals deferred to DASH-02+

gaps.finding: IR places bTIpm (upgrade/subscription banner group) as a sibling of ai_RNbBHXRE directly under ai_RNbBHXRD; brownfield beforeGrid banners render inside ai_RNbBHXRE between greeting-row and grid.

critiques.finding: Dashboard.tsx still reads useUserProfile directly for slot content instead of useDashboardUserContext, so the new composable is wired at the provider layer but not yet consumed by brownfield widget markup.
critiques.alternative: Migrate Dashboard.tsx slot builders to useDashboardUserContext (or pass user from a thin page-level hook) so AC-3 binding is exercised end-to-end before DASH-02+ splits widgets into child components.

critiques.finding: beforeGrid upgrade/reassessment CTAs are nested inside ai_RNbBHXRE; IR bTIpm is a separate ai_RNbBHXRD child outside dashboard-content. Acceptable brownfield retention for scaffold but diverges from Bubble sibling order.
critiques.alternative: Add a dashboard-banners slot sibling to dashboard-content (or data-bubble-id bTIpm region) when DASH-03+ lands subscription/micro-commitment rows.

critiques.finding: journalPreview and crisisSupport slots are defined with bubble ids but Dashboard.tsx does not pass content for complete-profile branch; slots render empty placeholders until DASH-06/DASH-07.
critiques.alternative: No action for DASH-01 scope; ensure downstream items mount into ai_RNbBHXSx and bTIfU without restructuring the grid.

shell_06_integration.notes: Dashboard.tsx preserves dashboardShellProps (bTHDT, ai_RNbBKLUh, ai_RNbBKLUi); DashboardMain owns ai_RNbBHXRD boundary inside DashboardLayout main slot; shell chrome unchanged.
